productDisplayName: Lotto Women's Juicy Black Flip Flop
description: Colour your life with a splash in these Juicy floaters from lotto. Soft and cushy, these slippers relax your tired feet and bring back the spring in your gait.Upper Foam thong straps for lightweight durability Lightly padded thong straps for snug Fit Elastane fabric toe separator for comfort Midsole Soft, cushy footbed for maximum comfort Fruity printed footbed for style Outsole Durable TPR outsole in waffle pattern for excellent grip and traction on all surfaces shoe careRub surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirtDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
